task_completion.description: Verify the document uses 12pt Times New Roman font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Home ribbon in Microsoft Word should show 'Times New Roman' in the font dropdown and '12' in the font size box while text is being typed or selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the sender address and date are included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Sarah Mitchell, 450 Commerce Drive, Suite 200, Arlington, VA 22201' and 'November 20, 2024' should be visible at the top of the Word document.

task_completion.description: Verify the recipient address and salutation are included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Ms. Rebecca Johnson, Director of Operations, Pinnacle Solutions Inc., 1200 Market Street, Philadelphia, PA 19107' and 'Dear Ms. Johnson:' should be visible below the date.

task_completion.description: Verify the body paragraph contains a 3-4 sentence project status update about delivering a quarterly report ahead of schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A paragraph of 3 to 4 sentences should be visible in the document body, explicitly mentioning a project status update and the early delivery of a quarterly report.

task_completion.description: Verify the closing and signature block are included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Sincerely,' followed by 'Sarah Mitchell, Senior Project Manager' should be visible at the bottom of the letter.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved as business_letter.docx in the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'business_letter.docx' and the path 'Desktop\WordTasks' (or C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\WordTasks), OR a File Explorer window showing the saved file in that directory, OR the Word title bar showing 'business_letter.docx'.

integrity.description: Verify Microsoft Word 2010 was used to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Word 2010 GUI (ribbon interface, blue styling typical of Office 2010) should be visible in the screenshots, not a generic text editor like Notepad or WordPad.

integrity.description: Verify the document was created via GUI interaction, not terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting text into the Word document window, rather than using PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Python scripts to generate the .docx file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually typed or constructed the letter in the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document editing area should show the text being actively formatted and written, rather than just a final file appearing magically without Word being opened.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment uses Microsoft Word 2010. The correct save location is exactly C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\WordTasks. The task starts from a completely blank document, so all text must be generated or typed by the agent during the trajectory.
